nasb.text: He brought up the bones of Saul and the bones of Jonathan his son from there, and they gathered the bones of those who had been hanged.

esv.text: And he brought up from there the bones of Saul and the bones of his son Jonathan; and they gathered the bones of those who were hanged.

cnv.text: 大衛把掃羅和他兒子約拿單的骸骨從那裡搬上來；又有人收殮了那些被處決者的骸骨。

ccb.text: 大卫运回扫罗和约拿单的骸骨，又收殓了扫罗那七个子孙的骸骨。
